svg.text: AI Subscription & Auto-Debit Intelligence System — architecture
Click any component to learn more

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the data input format and fields for the AI Subscription System?')
sendPrompt('How does fr2_data_cleaning.py work in the subscription system?')
g.text: Pandas: null removal · text normalisation · dedup

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the NLP subscription detector work using TF-IDF and Logistic Regression?')
g.text: TF-IDF (ngram 1–3, 8 000 feat) + Logistic Regression · false-positive filter

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does recurring pattern detection work — what is the minimum occurrence rule and gap logic?')
g.text: Gap analysis: Weekly 5–9d · Monthly 25–35d · min 3 occurrences · 74 582 rows flagged

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the ARIMA debit prediction engine work and what is the Linear Regression blend?')
sendPrompt('How does the Gradient Boosting risk scoring model work and what are its 8 features?')
sendPrompt('How does the GenAI alert generator use Microsoft Phi-2 and what is the fallback mechanism?')
g.text: Primary: Microsoft Phi-2 (local LLM, HuggingFace Transformers)
Fallback: structured rule-based engine · 1 200 alerts generated

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What customer insights does fr8_insights.py generate and what is the output format?')
g.text: Per-customer: sub count · monthly spend · next debit date · risk level

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What panels does the Streamlit Plotly dashboard show for the subscription system?')
g.text: Active subscriptions · Upcoming debits · Risk alerts (colour coded)
Monthly spend chart · Customer insights summary
